description_long: This is a weathered, cylindrical metal barrel with a distressed green paint finish and extensive patches of rust, indicating prolonged outdoor exposure. The barrel features two prominent yellow warning signs: one with a biohazard symbol and another with a skull and crossbones, both suggesting the contents are hazardous or toxic. The top of the barrel is flat with a slightly raised rim and a small circular cap or bung, typical of industrial storage drums. The body of the barrel is reinforced with two horizontal metal bands, one near the top and one near the bottom, providing structural strength. There are no visible handles or spouts, and the surface is rough and corroded in several areas. The overall appearance suggests it is used for storing or transporting dangerous materials in industrial or urban environments.
description: A rusted green metal barrel with yellow hazardous warning signs and reinforced bands, showing heavy weathering and corrosion.
description_view_0: Front view showing both yellow warning signs (biohazard and skull/crossbones) and extensive rust patches.
description_view_1: Side view with one warning sign partially visible and more rusted areas, especially on the right side.
description_view_2: Rear view with no warning signs visible, highlighting the corroded green surface and metal bands.
description_view_3: Side view with one warning sign barely visible on the left edge and a large area of rust on the right.
attribute_banding_or_reinforcement: metal hoops at top and bottom
attribute_labeling_or_markings: yellow biohazard and skull/crossbones warning signs
